paper.title: Gaia DR3 high radial velocity stars: Genuine fast-moving objects or outliers?

review.summary: Two internal tables: a comparison of SOPHIE/UVES radial velocities with literature surveys (Table:Surveys) and SB2 binary-component velocities for Gaia_432 (Table:SB2). One primary external resource: the CDS archive hosting the full electronic tables A.1 and B.1. Generic database acknowledgements (Gaia, SIMBAD, ORCID) omitted.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Compares the high-precision SOPHIE and UVES radial-velocity measurements obtained in this work with corresponding values from APOGEE DR17, LAMOST DR7, and Matsuno+22 for three cross-matched stars, validating the agreement to within 2 km/s after survey-specific zero-point corrections.

source_refs.caption: Comparison of the SOPHIE and UVES radial velocities to APOGEE~DR17, LAMOST~DR7, and \citet{Matsuno2022} measurements.
source_refs.label: Table:Surveys

columns.name: Target
columns.meaning: Internal target identifier used in this paper

columns.name: Spectrograph
columns.meaning: Spectrograph used for the ground-based observation (SOPHIE or UVES)

internal_tables.evidence: Comparison of the SOPHIE and UVES radial velocities to APOGEE~DR17, LAMOST~DR7, and \citet{Matsuno2022} measurements.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Records the radial-velocity measurements of both components of the double-line spectroscopic binary Gaia_432 from four consecutive SOPHIE exposures, obtained by fitting double Voigt profiles to the cross-correlation functions.

source_refs.caption: Velocities of the two components of the SB2 star Gaia\_432.
source_refs.label: Table:SB2

columns.name: MJD | [d]
columns.meaning: Modified Julian Date of the start of the exposure

internal_tables.evidence: Velocities of the two components of the SB2 star Gaia\_432.

external_resources.description: CDS archive hosting the full electronic versions of Tables A.1 (target coordinates and radial velocities) and B.1 (atmospheric parameters and metallicities for the SOPHIE sample).

source_refs.context:
\section*{Data availability}
Tables A.1 and B.1 are only available in electronic form at the CDS via anonymous ftp to cdsarc.u-strasbg.fr (130.79.128.5) or via http://cdsweb.u-strasbg.fr/cgi-bin/qcat?J/A+A/.
